title: Discovery, Estimation, and Identification
exclude_keywords: counterfactual explanation in graph neural networks

candidate_queries.query: ((ti:"causal discovery" OR abs:"causal discovery" OR ti:"structure learning" OR abs:"structure learning") AND (abs:causal OR ti:causal) AND (cat:stat.ML OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.AI))
((ti:"treatment effect" OR abs:"treatment effect" OR ti:counterfactual OR abs:counterfactual) AND (abs:causal OR abs:estimation OR abs:estimate)) AND (cat:stat.ML OR cat:cs.LG)
((abs:"hidden confound" OR abs:"latent confound" OR ti:"instrumental variable" OR abs:"instrumental variable" OR ti:mediation OR abs:mediation) AND (abs:causal OR ti:causal))

precision_queries.query: ((abs:CATE OR abs:ATE OR abs:uplift) AND (abs:causal OR abs:"treatment effect"))
